sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_shingle_simhash (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_shingle_simhash (id, description) VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is a fast open-source OLAP database management system.');
UPDATE test_shingle_simhash SET description = 'ClickHouse database is designed for real-time analytical queries.' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT wordShingleSimHash(description, 4) AS Hash FROM test_shingle_simhash WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, wordShingleSimHash(description) AS DefaultHash FROM test_shingle_simhash;
